phase: CO-3B: plugin consumer imports migrated to Core capability facades; only per-language AST dynamic-import tests remain as old core route exceptions
referenceLimitsNote: Limits are TRUE scanner counts (multi-line imports included), recalibrated 2026-06-21 after CO-3B migrated Plugin consumers to Core capability facades. Remaining limits are shrink-only for focused AST/project integration tests, infra DB fixture exceptions, and out-of-scope project-intelligence test residuals.

@alembic/core/infrastructure/database/dr.reason: No stable facade exports the drizzle singleton lifecycle (initDrizzle/getDrizzle/resetDrizzle). @alembic/core/database wires the singleton via DatabaseConnection.connect(), cannot open :memory: fixtures, and redirects excluded projects to a shared tmp DB, so it is not a semantics-preserving target for isolated test fixtures.
@alembic/core/infrastructure/database/dr.removalTrigger: Core ships a stable test/fixture facade (in-memory migrated DB + DrizzleDB without global singleton mutation); route via the IC/AD export-surface wave.

@alembic/core/infrastructure/database/dr.reason: No stable facade exports the drizzle schema tables (auditLogs).
@alembic/core/infrastructure/database/dr.removalTrigger: Core promotes schema table exports onto a stable facade, or an AuditStore DI wave removes the singleton fallback.

@alembic/core/infrastructure/database/mi.reason: Isolated :memory: fixtures need callable migration modules; openAlembicDatabase cannot target :memory: and mutates the global drizzle singleton. Hand-copied DDL (Alembic Train B shape) was rejected for the 40+ column knowledge_entries table after Alembic needed drift coordination (Alembic f5ff9e1) for a far smaller copy.
@alembic/core/infrastructure/database/mi.removalTrigger: Same stable test/fixture facade as the drizzle row.
Same stable test/fixture facade as the drizzle row.

consumers: test/unit/CallGraphAnalyzer.test.ts low-level call graph analyzer tests
@alembic/core/core/analysis.reason: CallGraphAnalyzer verifies ImportRecord, SymbolTableBuilder, ImportPathResolver, CallEdgeResolver, DataFlowInferrer, and CallGraphAnalyzer behavior directly. Stable @alembic/core/test-fixtures exposes high-level analyzeSourceFile/resources, but not these analysis classes.
@alembic/core/core/analysis.removalTrigger: Core ships a stable test fixture facade for low-level call graph analysis classes, or these tests move into AlembicCore.

@alembic/core/core.reason: The focused real-project integration tests still need project-level AST summaries. @alembic/core/test-fixtures exposes analyzeSourceFile but not analyzeProject/isAvailable, and @alembic/core/project-intelligence is no longer resolvable through the package export map.
@alembic/core/core.removalTrigger: Core ships stable test-fixtures project-analysis helpers, or these integration tests move into AlembicCore.

@alembic/core/core/discovery.reason: The focused real-project integration tests need direct discoverer registry setup. No stable test-fixtures facade currently exposes getDiscovererRegistry/resetDiscovererRegistry, and @alembic/core/project-intelligence is no longer resolvable through the package export map.
@alembic/core/core/discovery.removalTrigger: Core ships a stable discovery test fixture facade, or these integration tests move into AlembicCore.

consumers: test/unit/CallGraphAnalyzer.test.ts dynamic import() lazy loading of optional language grammars
@alembic/core/core/ast/lang-*.reason: CallGraphAnalyzer keeps language-specific plugin behavior tests against plugin.extractCallSites()/walk(). The stable @alembic/core/test-fixtures facade exposes high-level analyzeSourceFile/resources, but not the per-language plugin objects those tests assert.
@alembic/core/core/ast/lang-*.removalTrigger: Core ships a stable test fixture or lazy language-parser facade exposing the per-language plugin behavior needed by these tests.

@alembic/core/project-intelligence.reason: Existing tests outside CO-3B still import the retired project-intelligence aggregate. CO-3B migrated its focused CallGraphAnalyzer and enhancement/Go/bootstrap tests, but a full panorama/discovery test migration is separate follow-up scope.
@alembic/core/project-intelligence.removalTrigger: CO-4 or a dedicated project-intelligence test migration moves the remaining tests to stable facades or owned Core tests.
